stories.title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
stories.simple_summary: A company called Lovable is trying to raise money that would value it at $13.2 billion. This is mostly a business deal between the company and investors.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly matters to investors — nothing you need to act on.

stories.title: Datacentres are a ticking timebomb. We must make sure AI’s benefits outweigh the costs | Nicki Hutley
stories.simple_summary: The article discusses concerns about how much electricity AI systems use and whether their benefits are worth the environmental cost.
stories.why_it_matters: This could eventually affect your electricity bills and the environment, but there's no immediate action needed right now.

stories.title: Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
stories.simple_summary: Google made a tool that can spot fake images made by AI. It was used to confirm that a photo of Senator McConnell was fake, not real.
stories.why_it_matters: This matters because it helps protect people from being fooled by fake photos online — something that could affect anyone reading news on the internet.

stories.title: NEWSLETTER: China weighs silicon curtain around sought-after AI models
stories.simple_summary: China is considering limiting which powerful AI systems can be exported or used internationally.
stories.why_it_matters: This mostly affects tech companies and investors — ordinary people and small-business owners likely won't notice a change.

stories.title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
stories.simple_summary: Elon Musk's company released a new AI chatbot called Grok 4.5 that they say is cheaper and faster than similar products.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use AI tools, cheaper options might become available, though this particular one is still very new and specialized.

stories.title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
stories.simple_summary: A startup thinks they can train robots to be smarter by using data from video games instead of real-world examples.
stories.why_it_matters: This is early research that might make robots better in the future, but it's not something small-business owners need to think about yet.

stories.title: Opinion | Did We Make the Wrong Bet on Big A.I.?
stories.simple_summary: An opinion piece questions whether companies and investors have bet too much money on advanced AI systems.
stories.why_it_matters: This is someone's opinion piece about business strategy — nothing specific for you to act on.

stories.title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
stories.simple_summary: Google added a new feature to Google Photos that uses AI to improve your videos — it can brighten dark videos, change backgrounds, or add artistic effects.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Google Photos, you'll have new tools to make your vacation videos and family photos look better.

stories.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
stories.simple_summary: Someone thinks robots and AI will learn better from video game data than from information on the internet.
stories.why_it_matters: This is research thinking about AI's future development — nothing that affects you or your small business right now.

stories.title: Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
stories.simple_summary: Meta is adding a light to indicate when its AI glasses are recording, so people don't secretly film others. But Meta is also collecting more personal data for its AI products.
stories.why_it_matters: If you or people around you use these glasses, it's good they're adding a visible light — but the privacy concerns about data collection remain something to be cautious about.

stories.title: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI improved its voice AI so it can talk and listen at the same time, which makes live translation between languages easier and more natural.
stories.why_it_matters: If you travel or talk with people in different languages, this could eventually make translation easier and more natural-sounding.

stories.title: ChatGPT’s upgraded voice mode is better at shutting up
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI made ChatGPT's voice feature better at sounding like a real person — it interrupts you less and lets you finish your thoughts.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use ChatGPT's voice feature, conversations will feel more natural and less frustrating, like talking to a real person instead of a robot.
